message:
WMI-3 attacker content in authoritative position (offset-controlled-write): external content is written at an attacker-controlled offset ('pb') into object 'struct psmgr_desc' — reaching past its buffer into a trailing field (the authoritative position the consumer follows). [mechanism:write-at-attacker-offset;indicates=WMI-3] [mem:struct=psmgr_desc;field=pb;offset=?] [oracle:assert=pb stays within the object's declared buffer;assume=external content written at a variable offset into the object]
WMI-3 attacker content in authoritative position (offset-controlled-write): external content is written at an attacker-controlled offset ('out_offset') into object 'struct psmgr_desc' — reaching past its buffer into a trailing field (the authoritative position the consumer follows). [mechanism:write-at-attacker-offset;indicates=WMI-3] [mem:struct=psmgr_desc;field=out_offset;offset=?] [oracle:assert=out_offset stays within the object's declared buffer;assume=external content written at a variable offset into the object]
